selections.name: Delahra
selections.reason: Progressive filly coming off a narrow second at Sandown-Lakeside on a heavy track. Rapidly up in distance but looks highly suited.

selections.name: Ko Phangan
selections.reason: Brings strong metro formlines, including a solid third in the LR Carmichael last start over a mile on a slow track.

selections.name: Notified
selections.reason: Won last start at Ballarat Synthetic over 7 1/2f. Looks progressive and should stay the trip.

selections.name: Achy Breaky Heart
selections.reason: Finished fifth in the LR Carmichael last start. Minor hope in this small field.

danger_horse.name: Ko Phangan
danger_horse.reason: Brings the most established class form into the race.

selections.name: Hard Kick
selections.reason: Resuming. Won the LR Talindert on debut at this track and distance. Trialed exceptionally well leading in.

selections.name: Panchenko
selections.reason: Dominant debut winner by 5.5 lengths at Bendigo on a heavy track. Very dangerous with no weight.

selections.name: Leopard Shark
selections.reason: Resuming. Performed well in stakes grade last prep and has proven straight-track capability.

selections.name: Dark Matter
selections.reason: First starter by Cosmic Force who won a trial nicely at Rosehill. Respect stable confidence.

danger_horse.name: Panchenko
danger_horse.reason: Massive debut winner who could easily measure up to this grade.

selections.name: Madiyya (NZ)
selections.reason: Had excuses last start at Caulfield. Excellent second over this track and distance prior on a wet track.

selections.name: Changing Colours
selections.reason: Second-up. Hit the line strongly for fourth first-up over 7f here. Will take holding out.

selections.name: Sweet Jasmine
selections.reason: In career-best form, winning last start at Sandown-Lakeside over 7 1/2f on a heavy track.

selections.name: Barbie'sdreamworld
selections.reason: Third-up. Faded late in the Leilani Final last start but peaks now and is suited to this class.

danger_horse.name: Changing Colours
danger_horse.reason: Fitter second-up and maps to get a perfect run.

selections.name: Davida
selections.reason: Kept finding to run fifth in a strong 3yo handicap at Caulfield last start. Won well at Morphettville prior.

selections.name: Missapprehend
selections.reason: Excellent second first-up at Sale on a heavy track. Fitter and should be hard to hold out.

selections.name: Cherish Me
selections.reason: Ran sixth at Rosehill last start but won prior at Kensington on a soft track. In the mix.

selections.name: Laura Eliza
selections.reason: Dominant 2.25 length maiden winner last start on a heavy track. Highly progressive.

danger_horse.name: Missapprehend
danger_horse.reason: Strong second-up profile and handles wet conditions well.

selections.name: Prestige Forever
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after a dominant win at Sandown-Lakeside on a heavy track. Going exceptionally well.

selections.name: Flying Khan
selections.reason: Excellent second in the Silverbowl Final last start over a mile here. Rates highly.

selections.name: Kaleo
selections.reason: Disappointed last start in the Silverbowl Final but prior form was very consistent.

selections.name: Flying Done
selections.reason: Finished a solid third in the Silverbowl Final last start. Up in trip on better ground suits.

danger_horse.name: Flying Khan
danger_horse.reason: Boasts excellent track and distance form from last start.

selections.name: Black Run (FR)
selections.reason: Brings elite Sydney staying form, including a narrow second in the LR Winter Cup last start.

selections.name: Bold Soul (NZ)
selections.reason: Excellent second in the Banjo Paterson last start. Loves Flemington and is a key chance.

selections.name: Highland Blaze
selections.reason: Won the Banjo Paterson last start over 1 5/8m. Handles the wet and stays all day.

selections.name: Tajanis (IRE)
selections.reason: Disappointed last start but ran a strong third in the LR Sandown Cup prior. Can bounce back.

danger_horse.name: Bold Soul (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Highly consistent stayer with an excellent track record.

selections.name: Moby Dick
selections.reason: Solid fourth in the LR Santaanalane last start. Won a Bm84 over this track and distance prior.

selections.name: Barari
selections.reason: Excellent fourth in the LR Creswick last start. Won a 3yo handicap here prior. Gets in light.

selections.name: Great Maximus
selections.reason: Consistent sprinter who was a solid third at Caulfield last start. Always in the mix.

selections.name: Steel Move
selections.reason: Disappointed last start but ran a strong third in the Swan Hill Gold Topaz prior.

danger_horse.name: Barari
danger_horse.reason: Highly progressive 3yo filly with excellent straight-track credentials.

selections.name: Bankers Choice (NZ)
selections.reason: Excellent second in a Caulfield Quality last start. Won at Sandown prior. Hard to beat.

selections.name: Nellie Leylax (IRE)
selections.reason: Won a Caulfield Quality last start over 1 1/4m on a soft track. Big chance again.

selections.name: Saint George (GB)
selections.reason: Second-up. Solid fourth in the Davidbourke last start. Highly suited up to 1 1/4m.

selections.name: Smokin' Romans (NZ)
selections.reason: Consistent stayer who was a solid third in a Caulfield Quality last start.

danger_horse.name: Nellie Leylax (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: In peak form and handles rain-affected tracks exceptionally well.

selections.name: Prima Bella (NZ)
selections.reason: Excellent third at Randwick last start on a heavy track. Brings very strong Sydney form.

selections.name: Street Artist (NZ)
selections.reason: Excellent second at Caulfield last start. Best form reads well for this straight sprint.

selections.name: Next Step Iowa
selections.reason: Solid third at Caulfield last start. Won prior at Mornington on a heavy track.

selections.name: Along The River
selections.reason: Disappointed last start but won prior at Caulfield Heath on a soft track.

danger_horse.name: Street Artist (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Highly consistent sprinter suited by straight-track conditions.
